statement: In every magma, Equation 587 (`x = y * (z * (z * (w * u)))`) implies Equation 1676 (`x = (x * y) * ((z * w) * x)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0495
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op y (op z (op z (op w u))))) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op (op x y) (op (op z w) x))
